staleness_policies.rationale: Trial registry records can change after initial ingestion, especially posted-results and status fields.
PubMed abstracts and metadata are comparatively stable but can receive corrections or indexing updates.
PubMed summary metadata is comparatively stable but can receive corrections or indexing updates.
Unknown source snapshot types use a conservative refresh interval until a source-specific policy exists.
Retained registry text should trail registry source-snapshot refresh checks but still age into a repair queue.
Normalized abstracts are stable enough for annual watch checks.
Retained full-text artifacts should be rechecked periodically for corrections, retractions, and rights changes.
Unknown text-snapshot scopes use a conservative refresh interval until a scope-specific policy exists.

coverage_gaps.description: DKD and AD-risk human studies now have PubMed abstract-located sample, dosing, timepoint, and effect details, and IPF has an abstract-located dosing-completion result plus corrected randomized-pilot sample size. However, durable source snapshots could not be created in this worker, the legacy IPF generic outcome/result still needs reconciliation, and the D+Q bone RCT still needs full publication table and supplement reconciliation.
coverage_gaps.suggested_action: Create or refresh durable PubMed/PMC source snapshots for DKD, IPF, and AD-risk, complete full-text/table extraction where needed, and reconcile the bone RCT registry extraction against full article tables and supplements.

coverage_gaps.description: Aggregate adverse-event counts and the D+Q bone headache preferred-term row have been extracted for the D+Q bone RCT, and retained full-text locators now identify the safety table, withdrawal narrative, dosing cadence, and durability discussion. Event-specific structured rows beyond headache, discontinuation count fields, and source-snapshot-backed safety extraction for the DKD, IPF, and AD-risk human studies remain incomplete.
coverage_gaps.suggested_action: Run table-row extraction context packs for the remaining D+Q bone adverse-event terms and withdrawals, then ingest or retain appropriate source snapshots before extending safety extraction across DKD, IPF, and AD-risk studies.

coverage_gaps.description: Only two active no-results registry records were added in this repair pass; broader fisetin and D+Q trial surveillance remains incomplete.
coverage_gaps.suggested_action: Run a surveillance pass over ClinicalTrials.gov for senolytics, D+Q, fisetin, and senescence-targeting terms.

coverage_gaps.description: No recent systematic-review or meta-analysis source has been screened into the knowledge base.
coverage_gaps.suggested_action: Search for recent systematic reviews, meta-analyses, and trial-landscape reviews.
